# MANHAJ

> MANHAJ is a private AI operating system implementation service for operator-led B2B service and education businesses. It is built on the AOS-001 six-layer revenue foundation, configured to the client's workflows, and intended for client-owned accounts.

Canonical site: https://manhaj.ahmadbukhari.com
Company: Aixcel Solutions — https://aixcelsolutions.com
Founder and architect: Ahmad Bukhari — https://ahmadbukhari.com/about
Contact: ahmadbukhari4245@gmail.com
Booking: https://cal.com/ahmad-bukhari/ai-consultancy-call-with-ab

## Core facts

- AOS-001 layers: Capture, Qualify, Engage, Convert, Retain, and Intelligence.
- Delivery is founder-led and typically follows discovery, synthesis, build, installation, optimization, and ongoing modular work.
- Code, configurations, integrations, credentials, and data are intended to remain in client-owned accounts, subject to the written client agreement.
- The first 30-minute discovery call is free. The paid audit week is $1,500 and is credited toward an install if the client proceeds.
- Published setup tiers are Foundation ($5,000 + $2,000/month), Operator ($10,000 + $3,500/month), and Architect ($15,000 + $5,000/month).
- Public kiosks use anonymized or dummy data to demonstrate system patterns.
